title: Bohemia RPG
description: High-resolution realistic RPG textures designed for a medieval mod, enhancing the visual experience with detailed blocks, custom 3D models, realistic materials, atmospheric lighting, and immersive environment improvements.
body:
Bohemia RPG! 
Bohemia RPG is a high-resolution realistic texture pack for Minecraft, created for the TERRA ecosystem and an upcoming major medieval RPG mod. It's not just a replacement for vanilla textures, but a visual foundation for a hybrid gaming experience focused on survival, crafting, and atmosphere.

The pack completely transforms the game's appearance, adding 3D models, depth and volume to materials, realistic reflections, and a pronounced medieval aesthetic. The project is based on the principles of realism, authenticity, and visual harmony. For the best quality, the use of PBR shaders (SEUS, PTGI, Kappa, BSL, Photon, and other compatible ones) is recommended.

Bohemia is being developed in parallel with the mod, which will transport Minecraft to the medieval era, adding unique blocks, 3D models, and gameplay mechanics with a strong RPG focus. The texture pack is already ready for use and fully matches the style of the future mod, remaining its long-term visual foundation and receiving support for all new elements after its release.


Pack Versions:
- Free Version – for testing performance and compatibility, available on Modrinth without some textures, models, and additional files.
- Premium Version – early access to all updates, exclusive 3D models, and full support for the future mod (available by supporting the project on [Boosty](https://boosty.to/terrav)).

Recommended system requirements:
16 GB of RAM, a graphics card with 6 GB of VRAM, and an SSD.

Bohemia is not a one-time project, but part of the expanding TERRA RPG universe. Supporting the project helps develop the texture pack and the upcoming mod. Thank you for your trust and interest.


TERRA | A new dimension of the game world
You can increase interest in projects by rating them.

This project is suitable for both single and network use in the game.

Check out other TERRA projects.
